name: py2rust-wave4-layer2-live-e2e
title: Wave 4 Layer 2: live e2e（真实 tmux + 真实 provider CLI）
description: Live real-environment e2e: real tmux + real provider CLIs (codex/claude/gemini/opencode) + real socket. Staged S1 (infra smoke) -> S2 (single provider) -> S3 (multi + recovery) -> S4 (edge).
